overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a red-haired wizard character exploring a richly detailed gothic dormitory room with four-poster beds, fireplaces, and astronomical instruments. The character interacts with a white cat before exiting into a grand hall with stained glass windows and walking through corridors with other students.

scene_state.functional_zone: wizard dormitory room with four-poster beds and fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dormitory room, observing the wooden furniture and warm firelight

entered.detail: ornate wooden four-poster bed with red bedding and curtains
upholstered armchair with wooden frame near the wall
tall wooden dresser with multiple drawers
stone fireplace with active flames providing warm illumination
large ornate rug covering the stone floor
large antique terrestrial globe on wooden stand
dark wood cabinet with glass doors
large blackboard with astronomical diagrams and writing
portraits in ornate frames hanging on the wall
brass armillary spheres and celestial navigation tools on a sideboard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a cozy, firelit dormitory room with rich wooden paneling and gothic furniture. The space features four-poster beds, an antique globe, and astronomical instruments arranged on sideboards, with warm light casting shadows across the patterned rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: study area with blackboard and scientific instruments

events.description: character crouches down to interact with a white cat on the rug

agents.ego_description: examining the astronomical instruments and blackboard, then crouching to pet a white cat near the fireplace

notable_agents.action: white cat sitting on the patterned rug, being petted by the character

entered.detail: small white cat with dark markings sitting on the rug
heavy wooden door leading out of the dormitory
wooden coat rack with hanging robes

segments.scene_description: The character explores the study area featuring a large blackboard with diagrams and brass astronomical instruments, then turns back toward the fireplace where they crouch to pet a white cat sitting on the rug. The heavy wooden exit door becomes visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from dormitory to grand hall

events.description: opening the wooden door and stepping into the grand hall with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: standing up from petting the cat and walking toward the door, then exiting the room into the grand hall

entered.detail: walls with patterned wallpaper near the exit
small wooden console table with a lantern
tall gothic stained glass windows with colorful panes
sweeping wooden staircase with ornate railings
tall bookshelves filled with books and artifacts

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dormitory, walking past the coat rack and through the wooden door into a vast grand hall. The scene transitions from the intimate firelit room to a soaring space with stained glass windows and a grand staircase visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with gothic architecture and study areas

events.description: approaching a group of students gathered near a large stone statue

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall and into a corridor, passing other students in wizard robes and approaching a statue

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing near a study table with books
two students conversing near a large stone statue holding a globe

entered.detail: elaborate iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the high ceiling
tall pointed archways with intricate stone carvings
wooden tables with books and reading lamps along the wall
large stone statue of a robed figure holding a celestial globe
wall with carved inscriptions and names
stone archway leading to another corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the magnificent grand hall with soaring gothic archways and stained glass windows, passing wooden bookshelves and study tables. Other students are scattered throughout the space, and the character approaches a large stone statue near an inscribed wall at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate, firelit warmth of a gothic dormitory into the soaring scale of a magnificent grand hall. It begins by gliding through a cozy room filled with rich wooden paneling, four-poster beds, and astronomical instruments, before shifting toward a study area with a large blackboard. As the character crouches to pet a white cat by the fireplace, the camera pivots toward a heavy wooden exit door that leads out of the private quarters. The scene then expands abruptly as the character passes a coat rack and steps through the doorway, moving from the dim, golden light of the bedroom into a vast space defined by towering gothic archways and vibrant stained glass windows. Finally, the camera follows the character past bookshelves and other students, gliding through the grand hall toward a large stone statue and an inscribed wall at the end of the corridor.
